caption:
DELHI, 2026 is about to get LOUD. 🔥 Red Bull Moto Jam is bringing the full chaos package — drifting, FMX, stunt cars, stunt bikes… and topping it off with Indian-origin F1 rookie Arvid Lindblad taking a VCARB-branded F1 car to the streets. 🏎️💨
This isn’t just a demo run it’s India getting a front-row seat to a driver right on the edge of his first F1 season. We’re not watching from highlights anymore… we’re watching it LIVE. 🇮🇳🏁
So who’s pulling up? 👀

#RedBullMotoJam #RedBullIndia #Redbull
